LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Gauranlen.description: The remains of a Treefather, chopped down and left as a stump.
LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Gauranlen.label: chopped Treefather stump
LanguageData.Dryad_Basic.description: A basic treeminder, mammal-like and loyal to its Treefather. It can morph into specialized castes as needed.
LanguageData.Dryad_Basic.label: treeminder
LanguageData.DryadCocoon.description: A cocoon where a treeminder morphs into a new caste, guided by the Treefather's FEV-infused roots.
LanguageData.DryadCocoon.label: treeminder cocoon
LanguageData.DryadHealingPod.description: A pod filled with restorative Treefather sap, used to heal injured treeminders.
LanguageData.DryadHealingPod.label: healing pod
LanguageData.GaumakerCocoon.description: A cocoon where sproutlings merge to create a new Treefather pod, continuing the symbiotic cycle.
LanguageData.GaumakerCocoon.label: sproutling cocoon
LanguageData.GauranlenSeed.description: A seed from the Treefather, able to grow a new mutated tree and begin the symbiotic cycle.
LanguageData.GauranlenSeed.label: Treefather seed
LanguageData.Plant_MossGauranlen.description: A patch of moss that grows around the Treefather, beautifying the area and aiding treeminder production.
LanguageData.Plant_MossGauranlen.label: Treefather moss
LanguageData.Plant_PodGauranlen.description: A pod produced by the Treefather, containing the seeds of new treeminders.
LanguageData.Plant_PodGauranlen.label: Treefather pod
LanguageData.Plant_TreeGauranlen.description: A mutated tree infused with FEV, able to produce treeminders and pods. Its roots run deep, connecting it to the wasteland's secrets.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeGauranlen.label: Treefather
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Gauranlen.description: The remains of a Treefather, smashed and left as a stump.
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Gauranlen.label: smashed Treefather stump
